title: Rich Smoky Uruguayan Cheese Sandwich
description: A smoky cheese sandwich featuring ciabatta and a Uruguayan twist, perfect for a quick fix, with a low calorie count and a cheese pull effect achieved through spherification.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium heat.
Mix the sodium alginate with water to create a spherification bath.
Slice the Uruguayan cheese into thin strips and submerge them in the spherification bath for about 30 seconds.
Remove the cheese from the bath and place it on the ciabatta slices.
Drizzle the olive oil over the cheese and sprinkle with smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Place the other ciabatta slices on top of the cheese to create a sandwich.
Grill the sandwiches for about 2-3 minutes on each side, or until the cheese is melted and the bread is toasted.
Serve immediately and enjoy the cheese pull effect.
